faq.title: Frequently asked questions
faq.subtitle: Everything you need to know about PES

items.q: How does the educational assessment work?
items.a: The assessment is a free 45-60 minute session where one of our teachers evaluates your child's level, identifies gaps, and discusses objectives. Afterward, we propose the most suitable plan.

items.q: Are lessons at home or at your center?
items.a: We offer both options: home tutoring throughout Douala, or at our study spaces in Bonanjo. The choice depends on your preferences and selected plan.

items.q: What school levels do you accept?
items.a: We support students from CM2 through Terminale (General and Technical), with specialization in BEPC and BAC preparation.
All our teachers hold at least a bachelor's degree, are trained in our pedagogical methods, and undergo continuous evaluation. We only accept the best.
No. Our plans are commitment-free. You can adjust or suspend your subscription at any time with 15 days' notice.

cta.title: Ready to transform your child's results?
cta.subtitle: Join 500+ families who trust us. Free assessment, no commitment.
